description: LegalZoom is an online legal services platform for consumers and small businesses, offering business formation, compliance, intellectual property, estate planning, legal forms, and attorney-related services. Its public website also provides legal guides, templates, and business tools.
summary: LegalZoom exposes a documented OAuth authorization server and a catalog-listed MCP endpoint at `https://www.legalzoom.com/mcp/claude/v1`; no public REST, GraphQL, or CLI developer surface was found on legalzoom.com.
